### Post by Isomorphismus on 2009-04-05
Hi everyone,
I'm trying to get my huawei E220 modem to work with ubuntu. I was following the steps at

[http://linux.frankenberger.at/Huawei_E220_GUIs.html](http://linux.frankenberger.at/Huawei_E220_GUIs.html)

and gnome-ppp is dialing, but it stops checking a password. This is the output of the logfile:

--> Ignoring malformed input line: ";Do NOT edit this file by hand!"
--> WvDial: Internet dialer version 1.60
--> Cannot get information for serial port.
--> Initializing modem.
--> Sending: ATX3
ATX3
OK
--> Sending: at+cgdcont=1,"IP","WEB","0.0.0.0",0,0
at+cgdcont=1,"IP","WEB","0.0.0.0",0,0
OK
--> Modem initialized.
--> Please enter password (or empty password to stop):


how can I get on?

thx a lot,
Isomorphismus

---

### Post by Isomorphismus on 2009-04-06
ok, got it to work with umtsmon. sorry for spamming!

Iso
